checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths

No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 1822 divs with only 12 semantic elements
Good accessibility: 415/448 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 1/2 inputs have names, 2/2 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Good server-side rendering — content available without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 79 headings, well-structured
10 links with generic text ('click here', 'read more')
Good link accessibility: 338/348 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 503 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~123,450 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 3% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 38 — deeply nested structure
CSS class attributes consume ~13,558 tokens (11% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.15–$1.85 per load ($0.77–$9.26 for a 5-page session)
128 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region, search
All 101 images have alt attributes (44 descriptive, 57 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
Found 6 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
123 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
30 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 204ms
Moderate payload: 482KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 72 scripts (heavy JS), 33 stylesheets
Compression enabled: gzip
